extraction_reasoning: The litigation table separates matters filed by and against each category: all “By” rows were excluded, while the “Against” rows were counted separately for criminal, tax, statutory/regulatory and other columns. Criminal proceedings against the company, directors, promoters, KMP and senior management are all Nil, and statutory/regulatory actions against those listed entities are also Nil; the only tax counts are against directors and promoters personally, so they are excluded from the company/subsidiary tax count and aggregate amount. The company’s own litigation row is Nil, and no subsidiary row or quantified company/subsidiary matter is disclosed, so the aggregate amount against the company and subsidiaries is explicitly Nil, i.e. ₹0 million = ₹0.0 crore. No contingent-liabilities total or auditor/going-concern disclosure appears in the provided risk section. The section gives company-wide geographic concentration in revenue from operations (Maharashtra: 96.97% in full Fiscal 2025), but it does not disclose top-five or top-ten customer concentration; therefore both customer fields are null.
